title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: A tutorial on Infrastructure as Code using AWS CDK with Python to build a serverless REST API. The video demonstrates both manual console setup and automated deployment using CDK for DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway resources.
